description_long: This lantern features a robust, rectangular main body with a dark, metallic finish and a slightly ornate top panel adorned with a central decorative medallion. The front and rear sections are semi-octagonal, each fitted with three tall, arched windows that appear to be made of stained or frosted glass, allowing light to diffuse outward. The side panels are flat and display three vertical, narrow window slits, echoing the gothic style of the main windows. The base of the lantern is solid and extends into a mounting bracket or fixture, suggesting it is designed to be attached to a post or wall. Subtle decorative elements, such as the window tracery and the medallion, add a touch of elegance to the otherwise utilitarian structure. The overall design suggests a historical or vintage aesthetic, suitable for urban parks, plazas, or heritage districts.
description: A vintage-style lantern with a dark metal body, arched stained glass windows, and ornate decorative details, designed for post or wall mounting. Its gothic-inspired form and medallion top make it both functional and decorative.
description_view_0: Front view shows the semi-octagonal face with three tall, arched stained glass windows and the ornate medallion on top.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the rectangular body, three vertical window slits, and the extended mounting bracket at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the solid back panel, the mounting fixture, and the medallion detail on the top surface.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the first side, showing the same window slits and the semi-octagonal windowed section.
